00038 package java.lang.ref;
00039 
00040 import jelatine.VMPointer;
00041 
00058 public class WeakReference extends Reference
00059 {
00064     private VMPointer next;
00065 
00070     native static void addToWeakReferenceList(WeakReference ref);
00071 
00076     public WeakReference(Object referent)
00077     {
00078         super(referent);
00079         WeakReference.addToWeakReferenceList(this);
00080     }
00081 }
